backward_compatibility.rationale: Thin façade re-exports enrich_single_puzzle — callers unchanged

legacy_code_removal.rationale: Project dead code policy: delete, don't deprecate

option_selection.rationale: Unanimous governance approval. Layered SRP Extraction — 4-phase decomposition addresses all charter goals with minimum abstraction. Per-phase rollback. SOLID/DRY/KISS/YAGNI compliant.
